languages.text:
The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, sedation is removed.
If sedation is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If sedation is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.
Caster suffers {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of the battle.

traits.locale_text:
The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, sedation is removed.
If sedation is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If sedation is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.
Caster suffers {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of the battle.

languages.text:
Цель должна пройти проверку Выносливости на сопротивление, иначе получает эффект {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}седация{/g} на 1 раунд. Если цель получает урон до начала своего следующего хода, {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}седация{/g} снимается и цель получает эффект {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}раннее пробуждение{/g}.
Если {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}седация{/g} не снята до конца раунда, цель не получает {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}раннее пробуждение{/g}.
Обладатель аугмента получает +1 уровень {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}утомления{/g} до конца боя.
languages.original_text:
The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed.
If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.
The user suffers +1 stack of {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Цель должна пройти проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g}, иначе получает эффект {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}седация{/g} на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}. Обладатель аугмента получает +1 уровень {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}утомления{/g} до конца боя.

The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, sedation is removed.
If sedation is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}awakened early{/g} effect. If sedation is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}awakened early{/g}.
The user suffers {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.

The target must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, sedation is removed.
If sedation is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If sedation is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.
At the start of each turn, the user loses −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} until the end of combat.

The target must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, sedation is removed.
If sedation is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If sedation is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.
At the start of each turn, the user loses −1 {g|Encyclopedia:ActionPoints}AP{/g} until the end of combat.

languages.text:
La cible doit réussir un test de résistance d'Endurance. En cas d'échec, elle subit {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sédation{/g} durant 1 round. Si elle subit des dégâts avant le début de son prochain tour, l'effet est supprimé.
Le cas échéant, elle bénéficie à la place de {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Réveil anticipé{/g}. Si l'effet {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sédation{/g} n'est pas dissipé avant la fin du round, elle n'obtient pas {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Réveil anticipé{/g}.
L'utilisateur subit +1 cumul de l'effet {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}Fatigue{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat.
languages.original_text:
The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed.
If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
La cible doit réussir un test de résistance d'Endurance. En cas d'échec, elle subit {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sédation{/g} durant 1 round. Si elle subit des dégâts avant le début de son prochain tour, l'effet est supprimé.
Le cas échéant, elle bénéficie à la place de {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Réveil anticipé{/g}. Si l'effet {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sédation{/g} n'est pas dissipé avant la fin du round, elle n'obtient pas {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Réveil anticipé{/g}.
L'utilisateur subit +1 cumul de l'effet {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}Fatigue{/g} jusqu'à la fin du combat.

languages.text:
Hedef, Dayanıklılık direnç testinden geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedasyon{/g} etkisine maruz kalır. Etkisi 1 raunt sürer. Hedef, bir sonraki turu başlamadan önce hasar alırsa {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedasyon{/g} ortadan kalkar.
{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sedasyon{/g} bu şekilde ortadan kalkarsa hedef, {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}erken uyanış{/g} etkisi kazanır. {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sedasyon{/g}, raunt bitiminden önce kaldırılmazsa hedef, {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}erken uyanış{/g} etkisi kazanamaz.
Kullanıcı, +1 {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}yorgunluk{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
languages.original_text:
The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed.
If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.
The user suffers +1 stack of {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.

Hedef, Dayanıklılık direnç testinden geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedasyon{/g} etkisine maruz kalır. Etkisi 1 raunt sürer. Hedef, bir sonraki turu başlamadan önce hasar alırsa {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedasyon{/g} ortadan kalkar.
{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sedasyon{/g} bu şekilde ortadan kalkarsa hedef, {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}erken uyanış{/g} etkisi kazanır. {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sedasyon{/g}, raunt bitiminden önce kaldırılmazsa hedef, {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}erken uyanış{/g} etkisi kazanamaz.
Kullanıcı, +1 {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}yorgunluk{/g} birikimine maruz kalır. Etkisi çatışma sonuna dek sürer.

languages.text:
目标必须通过一项坚韧抗性检定，否则陷入{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}镇静{/g}状态，持续1轮。若目标在其下个回合开始前受到伤害，解除{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}镇静{/g}状态。
若以此方式解除{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}镇静{/g}状态，目标获得{g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}早醒{/g}效果。若{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}镇静{/g}状态在本轮结束前仍未解除，则目标不会获得{g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}早醒{/g}效果。
使用者承受1层{g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}疲劳{/g}效果，持续至战斗结束。

The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed.
If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. The user suffers +1 stack of {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.

若以此方式解除{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}镇静{/g}状态，目标获得{g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}早醒{/g}效果。若{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}镇静{/g}状态在本轮结束前仍未解除，则目标不会获得{g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}早醒{/g}效果。
使用者承受1层{g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}疲劳{/g}效果，持续至战斗结束。

languages.text:
El objetivo debe superar una prueba de fortaleza de Resistencia o sufrirá el efecto {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedación{/g} durante 1 asalto. Si el objetivo sufre algún daño antes de que empiece su próximo turno, se elimina el efecto de {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedación{/g}.
Si se elimina de este modo el efecto de {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedación{/g}, el objetivo gana el efecto {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}despertar prematuro{/g}. Si no se elimina el efecto de {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedación{/g} antes del final del asalto, el objetivo no gana {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}despertar prematuro{/g}.
El usuario sufre +1 acumulación de {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigado{/g} hasta el final del combate.

El usuario sufre +1 acumulación de {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigado{/g} hasta el final del combate.

languages.text:
Das Ziel muss eine Widerstandsprobe auf Zähigkeit bestehen, um nicht 1 Runde lang mit {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sedierung{/g} belegt zu werden. Erleidet das Ziel vor dem Beginn seines nächsten Zuges Schaden, wird {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sedierung{/g} entfernt.
Wird {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sedierung{/g} auf diese Weise entfernt, erhält das Ziel den Effekt {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Frühes Erwachen{/g}. Wird {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sedierung{/g} nicht vor dem Ende der Runde entfernt, erhält das Ziel {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Frühes Erwachen{/g} nicht.
Der Nutzer wird bis zum Ende des Kampfes mit +1 Stapel {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}Erschöpft{/g} belegt.
languages.original_text:
The target must pass a Toughness resistance test or suffer the {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} effect for 1 round. If the target suffers damage before the start of its next turn, {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed.
If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.
The user suffers +1 stack of {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Das Ziel muss eine Widerstandsprobe auf Zähigkeit bestehen, um nicht 1 Runde lang mit {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sedierung{/g} belegt zu werden. Erleidet das Ziel vor dem Beginn seines nächsten Zuges Schaden, wird {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sedierung{/g} entfernt.
Wird {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sedierung{/g} auf diese Weise entfernt, erhält das Ziel den Effekt {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Frühes Erwachen{/g}. Wird {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}Sedierung{/g} nicht vor dem Ende der Runde entfernt, erhält das Ziel {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}Frühes Erwachen{/g} nicht.
Der Nutzer wird bis zum Ende des Kampfes mit +1 Stapel {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}Erschöpft{/g} belegt.

languages.text:
対象は耐久力抵抗判定に成功しなければ、1ラウンドの間{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}鎮静{/g}効果を受ける。対象が次のターン開始前にダメージを受けた場合、{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}鎮静{/g}は解除される。
この方法で{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}鎮静{/g}が解除された場合、対象は{g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}早期覚醒{/g}効果を得る。ラウンド終了前に{g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}鎮静{/g}が解除されなかった場合、対象は{g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}早期覚醒{/g}を得ない。
使用者は戦闘終了まで{g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}疲労{/g}状態を受ける。

If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is removed this way, the target gains the {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g} effect. If {g|f:0e44d2c723ef4c9295142503888aa5fc}sedation{/g} is not removed before the end of the round, the target does not gain {g|f:a07e7b49ead74e5aabae72858414928e}early awakening{/g}.
The user suffers +1 stack of {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.
